message:
test(fuzz): extend fuzz_query_str corpus with 28 structured seeds

Add adversarial seeds covering DataFrame.query() filter expressions:
- Comparison to zero: gt, lt, gte, lte, eq, neq
- Column comparisons: a>b, a<b, a==b, a!=b
- Boolean operators: and, or, not with parentheses
- Arithmetic in conditions: a+b>0, a-b>0, a*b>0
- Multi-column: 4-column AND, 4-column arithmetic comparison
- Policy variants: strict and hardened runtime
- Dtype variants: float comparisons
- Edge cases: null values, 8-row frames
- Filter outcomes: filter_some, filter_none, filter_all

Adds replay test fuzz_query_str_bytes_replays_committed_corpus_seeds
to validate all 28 new seeds pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+#[test]

+            include_bytes!("../../../../fuzz/corpus/fuzz_query_str/bool_not.bin"),

+        ),

+        ),

+            include_bytes!("../../../../fuzz/corpus/fuzz_query_str/arith_sub_cmp.bin"),
+        ),
+        (
+            "arith_mul_cmp.bin",

+        ),

+        ),

+        ),
+        (
+            "eight_rows.bin",
+            include_bytes!("../../../../fuzz/corpus/fuzz_query_str/eight_rows.bin"),
+        ),
+        (
+            "filter_some.bin",
+            include_bytes!("../../../../fuzz/corpus/fuzz_query_str/filter_some.bin"),
+        ),
+        (

+        ),
+        (
+            "filter_all.bin",
+            include_bytes!("../../../../fuzz/corpus/fuzz_query_str/filter_all.bin"),
+        ),
+    ];
+
+    for (name, seed) in seeds {
+        let result = fuzz_query_str_bytes(seed);
+        assert!(
+            result.is_ok(),
+            "query_str corpus seed {name} should pass: {result:?}"
+        );
+    }
+}
